fiservFeeAnalysisV2.noticeText:
IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT YOUR ACCOUNT
IMPORTANT NOTICE:Effective December 1, 2024, the Mastercard Network Access and Brand Usage (NABU) fee will be assessed at the existing
rate. No action is required from your business; this notice is for informational purposes only.
Important Information:1099-K forms for tax year 2024 will be made available in Control Center by January 31, 2025. To download your 1099-K, sign
in to ClientLine Enterprise (CLX) and navigate to the Tax Documents section.
Year-end statements:Your December statement is the final statement of the 2024 calendar year. Please retain a copy for your records and tax
preparation.
Holiday processing reminder:Funding may be delayed by federal banking holidays. Transactions submitted on or near holidays will be funded the
next business day.
For more information, visit CLX Resources or contact your account management representative.
